name: Quantower
description_short: Multi-broker trading platform with professional order flow tools, DOM trading, and volume analysis for futures and crypto.
description_long:
Quantower is a multi-broker trading platform that provides professional-grade order flow analysis, charting, and trade execution tools. The platform connects to dozens of brokers and data providers, allowing traders to use a single interface regardless of which brokerage they trade through.

Quantower's order flow toolkit includes footprint charts, volume profile, cluster charts, DOM (Depth of Market) trading, and time and sales analysis. The platform's TPO (Time Price Opportunity) charts and volume-weighted tools give futures traders deep market structure insights.

Pricing follows a freemium model: the free version provides access to most panels and basic functionality, while paid plans ($39/month basic, $70/month full) unlock advanced features. A lifetime license at $1,590 is available for traders who want to avoid recurring costs. Quantower is also available for free through some broker partnerships like Optimus Futures.
pros: Connects to 30+ brokers and data providers
Professional order flow tools at accessible pricing
Lifetime license option avoids recurring costs
cons: Windows only, no Mac or web version
